title: Jamaican Jerk Tender Hash Browns
description: A delicious twist on classic hash browns, infused with the bold flavors of Jamaican jerk seasoning. Perfect as a side dish or snack.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine grated potatoes, jerk seasoning, chopped thyme, and grated onions.
Transfer the mixture to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Spread the mixture out evenly and shape into a rectangle.
Drizzle with a little oil and season with salt and pepper.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown and crispy.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
Cut into squares or serve as is.
